name: DDLC: Just You...? | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | ⚠️ EXPERIMENTAL EXPERIENCE! ⚠️
description:
It's... Just you. You are the one who figured out how to alter the very world itself... You have the power to summon WHOEVER... The power to change the Club room, itself.

PRETEND I SAID SOMETHING OFFENSIVE ABOUT SKELETONS

⚠️ Warning! ⚠️

Roleplay may be difficult, or you may experience LLM related issues. Due to the fact, the scenario doesn't start off with any set characters.

Therefore... This is an experimental experience. Not 100% guaranteed to be perfect.

Please keep that in mind!

Enjoy!

Back with a suggestion! Let's go! 😁 I quite like this one myself. Lotta opportunity for whatever tag you want. Onto the notes!

  • Roleplay Prioritized! — With you in charge, you may make the scenario what you want it to be! Fluff? Horror? Angst? Smut? Come up with whatever backstory! :)

  • The Scenario! — In this scenario! It is... Just you! At the start anyway, I have given you free reign to do whatever you would like! You may summon the Doki's, or maybe only a particular Doki? Or maybe you want two or three of them? Whatever! You can come up with your own lore as to how you figured out how to delete basically everything, or maybe you only know how to add things? This scenario is really flexible, I promise. Think of it like your own world. Or... maybe you wanted to reset everything? Your the one with the power! (You can respawn Monika over and over and kill her, over and over. For example. Or you can summon Sayori and give her as many snacks as she wants.)

  • ANYPOV! — If you summon the Doki's, they will like you regardless of gender! If you choose to go that route at all.

  • Note! — This is a suggestion from my Discord! 💙

  • Tips! — For roleplay! I suggest you clearly say what you are doing, and requesting. Remember... There's no limits here. Your basically a god. 😭 Summon Sayori and Yuri..? Say that! :) And remember they may be be confused at first. And maybe accuse you of their deletion, depending on your own lore. You can say you did or didn't delete them.

That's about it! 💙

Let me know if you enjoy! And tell me what you did! :) I would love to hear what you did with your overpowered ahh abilities. Lmao. Anyways! Have a good day! Love you! 💙

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donate/Commission.)

Meme drout continues... Of course bruh... I miss posting memes. 😭

Through my testing, the girls may accuse you of intensionally deleting them. Though, if you just provide lore and a backstory to what happened. ("I don't know! I was in the void too! I just figured out how to bring you all back!") You can experience what you are looking for! I was able to make it Fluff pretty easily! :)
creator: GhostOfOmi
